_comment: Model routing configuration. Update model names here to switch providers without touching workflows.

cheap_classifier._note: Used for high-volume classification. Prioritize cost over capability.

mid_enricher._note: Scaffold only. Not active in V1. Used for enrichment when score >= 4 and confidence != high.

premium_digest._note: Used once per day for digest synthesis only. Never used for classification.

_notes.min_score_to_keep: Only items with AI score 4 or 5 are stored in Google Sheets
_notes.rule_score_threshold: Items must pass rule scoring >= 3 before being sent to any AI model
_notes.batch_digest: Send all daily high-value items in a single digest synthesis call, not individually
